title: Kerner (company)
content:
{{Top|canon=Kerner Optical}}
'''Kerner''', also known as '''Kerner Corp.''', was an optics company that made [[Holoprojector/Legends|optical holo-emitters]] as well as [[cloaking device]]s such as the [["Defel" Cloaking Belt]] and the [[Multi-Phase Hibridium Stealth System]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kerner is named for the real-life Kerner, which was the smokescreen name for [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] while in San Rafael, California and is now the true name for former ILM model and stage departments.
